production_assistant.technical_quality_notes: Audio is clear and consistent. Pacing is deliberate and fits the 'Grandpa' persona perfectly. High frequency of 'Uh' and 'So' acts as a rhythmic bridge rather than a distraction in this specific brand voice.
thematic_silence: 04:34 - Structural collapse of the abandoned house

strategic_analyst.safety_protocol_notes: Grandpa frequently ignores the 'Rested' bonus and food buffs until health is critically low (0:10:46). This creates high-tension moments but violates the 'Shieldmaiden’s Rule' of readiness.
strategic_analyst.session_goal_status: Partial: Bow crafted and Black Forest found; Base and Armor still in progress.
highlight_gold: 08:17 - 'Day in the sun is a day well-lived.'
28:12 - First Troll sighting and tactical retreat.
28:38 - 'Discretion being the better part of honor.'
strategic_analyst.strategic_growth_goal: Transition from modern gaming terminology (physics, dot, biome) to Saga Lexicon to deepen immersion while maintaining the helpful 'Grandpa' guidance.
